name: Stuffed Cheese Pizza
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Part Skim Mozzarella Cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast in the warm water in a large bowl.
2. Add the flour, salt, oregano, oil, and 1 cup of water to the yeast mixture. Mix well.
3. Knead the dough on a lightly-floured surface for about 2 minutes, or until smooth.
4. Place the dough in an oiled bowl. Cover with a damp towel and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until doubled in bulk.
5. Punch down the dough. Divide into two parts.
6. Press half the dough onto the bottom of a 10-inch oiled pie pan.
7. Sprinkle cheese and broccoli over the dough.
8. Press the other half of the dough into a 10-inch round. Place on top of the cheese and broccoli.
9. Crimp the edges together. Make several slashes in the top crust.
10. Bake in a 400-degree oven for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove from the oven.
11. Spread pizza sauce over the baked crust.
12. Return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes.
Serves 8
One Serving calories: 282 Carbohydrates: 37 Protein: 16 Fat: 10 Sodium: 424 Potassium: 425 Cholesterol: 16 Exchange Value: 2 Medium-Fat Meat Exchanges + 2 Bread Exchanges + 2 Vegetable Exchanges
